MBE Certified · Licensed & Insured · SAM.gov Registered

MBE-Certified Commercial Cleaning in New York City

GreenPoint Maintenance Services Corp is a certified Minority Business Enterprise delivering verified janitorial and facility maintenance. SAM.gov registered. NAICS 561720. 5-state coverage.

Schedule a Free Walkthrough → 347-332-9348
✓MBE / MWBE Certified
✓SAM.gov Registered
✓NAICS 561720
✓$2M+ Insured & Bonded

Procurement officers and facility managers seeking MBE-certified cleaning vendors in New York City need a provider that delivers both compliance documentation and measurable cleaning performance. GreenPoint Maintenance Services Corp holds MBE certification through NYC Small Business Services and MWBE certification through New York State — verified credentials that satisfy diversity spending goals for city, state, and federal contracts.

Beyond certification, GreenPoint brings operational rigor that separates us from checkbox vendors. Every cleaning session is documented through JaniTrack, our proprietary verification system with timestamped photos, GPS-tagged task completion, and ATP bioluminescence testing. When auditors or board members ask for proof of service, you have a real-time dashboard — not a cleaning crew's word.

We serve over 80 facilities across five states with a workforce of 80+ background-checked professionals. Our NAICS codes — 561720 (Janitorial), 238210 (Electrical/Wiring), and 561790 (Building Services) — cover the full spectrum of facility maintenance. One vendor, one invoice, one point of accountability.

What's Included

Commercial Janitorial Programs

Daily, weekly, and monthly cleaning for offices, lobbies, restrooms, and common areas. Customized scope of work with fixed pricing and no hidden fees.

Disinfection & Sanitization

CDC-compliant electrostatic disinfection and ATP-verified surface sanitization for schools, healthcare, and high-traffic environments.

Floor Care & Restoration

VCT stripping and refinishing, carpet extraction, marble and stone maintenance, and hardwood care. Scheduled or one-time deep clean programs.

Day Porter Services

Dedicated on-site daytime staff for continuous upkeep of lobbies, restrooms, conference rooms, and high-traffic zones during business hours.

Facility Maintenance

Light plumbing, electrical, painting, and general repairs under NAICS 238210 and 561790. Consolidate vendors and reduce administrative overhead.

Post-Construction Cleanup

Three-stage rough, light, and final construction cleanup. Dust removal, window cleaning, floor preparation. Move-in ready within 48 hours.

Why Facility Managers Choose GreenPoint

MBE / MWBE Certified
Verified Minority Business Enterprise through NYC SBS and NYS. Qualifies for diversity procurement, set-aside contracts, and supplier diversity programs.
JaniTrack Verification
Proprietary real-time cleaning verification with timestamped photos, GPS tagging, and ATP bioluminescence testing. Audit-ready documentation on demand.
SAM.gov & Federal Ready
Actively registered on SAM.gov with valid CAGE code and UEI. NAICS 561720, 238210, 561790. Capability statement and full vendor package available.
5-State, 80+ Workforce
Operational across NY, NJ, CT, PA, and FL with 80+ background-checked professionals. Scalable from single-site to multi-location contracts.

Frequently Asked Questions

MBE certification verifies that a company is at least 51% minority-owned, operated, and controlled. For procurement, it means GreenPoint qualifies for diversity spending goals, MWBE set-aside contracts, and supplier diversity programs at city, state, and federal levels.

MBE through NYC Small Business Services, MWBE through New York State, and active SAM.gov registration for federal contracting. NAICS codes: 561720, 238210, and 561790.

Yes. Our certifications satisfy diversity procurement for NYC agencies, NYS contracts, Port Authority projects, and federal contracts. We provide capability statements, W-9, COI, and compliance letters within one business day.

561720 (Janitorial Services), 238210 (Electrical Contractors and Other Wiring Installation), and 561790 (Other Services to Buildings and Dwellings).

Download our capability statement at greenpointms.com/capability-statement. For W-9, COI, or other procurement documents, email info@greenpointms.com or call 347-332-9348.

Request a Facility Assessment

Download our capability statement, schedule a walkthrough, or request vendor documentation. MBE-certified, SAM.gov registered, fully insured.
